sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side. not the most forgiving cooking fat because great chemistry on paper, but use case is narrower than the headline suggests. easy to overpour without noticing because practical portion creep is real. not a complete food on its own because even the better fats are still just part of a meal.

closing.summary: Flaxseed Oil stands out for highly useful in cooking and efficient energy source. but it also gets held back by not the most forgiving cooking fat and easy to overpour without noticing. Best in controlled amounts where fat quality is the main reason to use it.
